publishedAbstract: - Alert PrometheusDuplicateTimestamps keeps on firing indefinitely.- Prometheus pods running in openshift-monitoring project streams below logs:- Follow KCS [How to determine the cause for PrometheusDuplicateTimestamps alerts.](https://access.redhat.com/articles/7113719) to ensure the source of the `Duplicates`. ~~~ $ oc logs-c prometheus prometheus-k8s-0-n openshift-monitoring | grep "Error on ingesting"... 2024-12-27T05:36:01.630586521Z ts=2024-12-27T05:36:01.630Z caller=scrape.go:1738 level=warn component="scrape manager" scrape_pool=serviceMonitor/openshift-monitoring/kube-state-metrics/0 target=https://:8443/metrics msg="Error on ingesting samples with different value but same timestamp" num_dropped=69 2024-12-27T05:37:01.619302172Z ts=2024-12-27T05:37:01.619Z caller=scrape.go:1738 level=warn component="scrape manager" scrape_pool=serviceMonitor/openshift-monitoring/kube-state-metrics/0 target=https://:8443/metrics msg="Error on ingesting samples with different value but same timestamp" num_dropped=69 ~~~
publishedTitle: ODF:  Rook Ceph OSD Key Rotation Pods create "PrometheusDuplicateTimestamps alerts".
